name: Churrascos Flan De Queso
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Cream Cheese, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixer or blender, blend eggs, yolks, sweetened condensed milk, whole milk, vanilla and cream cheese until smooth. Beat for 10 minutes.
2. In a heavy-bottomed saucepan, melt sugar over medium heat until caramelized. Once melted and golden brown, add water. Stir to combine.
3. Pour a small amount of caramel into each of 12 individual, ovenproof flan dishes. Divide the milk mixture evenly among the dishes. Place the dishes in a larger baking dish and fill with water to cover up halfway on the flan dishes.
4. Bake uncovered at 200 degrees Fahrenheit for one hour.
